summary: Honor Pixabay API Terms of Service: visible attribution, 24h response cache, user-triggered-only, and removal of the bulk-corpus harvest command.
reason: Pixabay granted full API access conditioned on: crediting Pixabay with a visible link on displayed results; caching responses up to 24h; user-triggered usage only (no background/automated requests); and no AI/ML, dataset generation, or scraping. The generated 5-minute response cache, lack of explicit attribution, and the harvest (500-cap-busting) command conflicted with these terms.
validated_outcome: shipcheck 7/7 PASS; JSON/piped output stays clean (credit only on TTY human output); response cache TTL = 24h; harvest command removed and 7 novel features remain.
